name: Josephine Chiang
birth_place: 美国,德克萨斯州,奥斯汀
introduction: Josephine Chiang is an Asian-American actor based in New York City. They were born in Austin, Texas and grew up in Taichung, Taiwan, until they moved to California to pursue their Bachelor of Arts at the University of California, Berkeley. Soon after graduating, they moved to New York City to pursue a career in film acting. Across their work, Josephine is most known for bringing to life stories on queer and Asian experiences.
